title: hieracium monregalense subsp. monregalense
intro: Hieracium monregalense subsp. monregalense, also known as hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds, which may also have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Hieracium monregalense subsp. monregalense, such as infusions and tinctures, are used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
